'''vaburu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbari|mbari]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbari|mbari]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vaburu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væbirith|væbirith]] || [[word:væbirij|væbirij]] || [[word:væbirish|væbirish]] || [[word:væbiri|væbiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vabuburuth|vabuburuth]] || [[word:vabuburuj|vabuburuj]] || [[word:vabuburush|vabuburush]] || [[word:vabuburu|vabuburu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vaburuth|vaburuth]] || [[word:vaburuj|vaburuj]] || [[word:vaburush|vaburush]] || [[word:vaburu|vaburu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vabufruth|vabufruth]] || [[word:vabufruj|vabufruj]] || [[word:vabufrush|vabufrush]] || [[word:vabufruf|vabufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vaburuthu|vaburuthu]] || [[word:vaburuju|vaburuju]] || [[word:vaburushu|vaburushu]] || [[word:vaburuku|vaburuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vaburuth|vaburuth]] || [[word:vaburuj|vaburuj]] || [[word:vaburush|vaburush]] || [[word:vaburu|vaburu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vaburuthul|vaburuthul]] || [[word:vaburujul|vaburujul]] || [[word:vaburushul|vaburushul]] || [[word:vaburukul|vaburukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vaburuthuthu|vaburuthuthu]] || [[word:vaburujuju|vaburujuju]] || [[word:vaburushushu|vaburushushu]] || [[word:vaburuku|vaburuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vaburuthun|vaburuthun]] || [[word:vaburujun|vaburujun]] || [[word:vaburushun|vaburushun]] || [[word:vaburukun|vaburukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vaburuthuoro|vaburuthuoro]] || [[word:vaburujuoro|vaburujuoro]] || [[word:vaburushuoro|vaburushuoro]] || [[word:vaburukuoro|vaburukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
